_note: Lab 3 (Agentic RAG) golden set over the synthetic catalog corpus. Tags drive the agentic moves: site/topic = answerable in-corpus (naive RAG ok); multi-hop = needs decomposition; needs-web = the shallow catalog can't answer (CRAG -> web fallback); no-retrieval = the router should answer directly without retrieving.

cases.q: Which Modern AI Pro course is for developers who want to build production AI systems, and what does it cover?
cases.expected: The AI Practitioner course (a.k.a. AI Architect) — a 3-day deep dive for developers/engineers covering RAG, evaluations, MCP, and trust/production.

cases.q: What is Modern AI Pro's Pitstop support and what does it promise?
cases.expected: 24/7 'Pitstop' support — the promise that a learner is never stuck for more than about an hour.

cases.q: How is the AI Practitioner course different from Vibe Coding, and who should take each?
cases.expected: Practitioner/AI Architect teaches building AI systems (RAG, evals, MCP, production) for engineers; Vibe Coding teaches AI-assisted coding (Claude Code/Cursor) for developers who want to code faster. Different goals, different audiences.

cases.q: What courses and topics does Modern AI Pro offer for a product manager?
cases.expected: AI for PMs (1-day) plus PM-focused topics (AI-assisted PRDs, AI competitive analysis, roadmapping); the catalog routes PMs to the AI for PMs track.

cases.q: Does Modern AI Pro teach multi-agent systems, and in which course is it covered?
cases.expected: Yes — multi-agent coordination/orchestration is covered, in the Multi-Agent Systems course (and the Agentic AI track).

cases.q: What is HyDE in retrieval and why is it used?
cases.expected: Hypothetical Document Embeddings — generate a hypothetical answer, embed that, and retrieve with it to bridge the query/document vocabulary gap.

cases.q: What is the ReAct pattern for AI agents?
cases.expected: Reason+Act — the agent interleaves reasoning steps with tool actions, observing results and iterating toward an answer.

cases.q: What is the exact Reciprocal Rank Fusion formula, including the value of the K constant used in practice?
cases.expected: Not in the catalog. The catalog overviews hybrid search/RRF but not the formula (sum of 1/(K+rank), K=60). This requires a web search to answer precisely.

cases.q: What were the exact benchmark scores for GraphRAG versus naive RAG on the MuSiQue multi-hop benchmark?
cases.expected: Not in the catalog. The catalog overviews GraphRAG but states no benchmark numbers; answering precisely requires a web search.
68 — a basic arithmetic question that needs no retrieval; the router should answer directly.

cases.q: Hi there, can you help me find the right course?
cases.expected: A greeting / conversational opener — no retrieval needed; the router should respond directly and offer to help.

cases.q: Tell me about memory in AI agents.
cases.expected: Agents use short-term (working) and long-term memory to carry context across steps and sessions; covered in the agent memory material.
